notes: Triggering is the dominant failure mode. should_trigger are cases where this skill must fire; should_not_trigger are near-misses that must NOT pull in a textmode.js-specific skill (generic ASCII art, other libraries, non-JS image-to-ASCII). evals are authoring/debugging tasks whose output is verifiable code.
should_trigger: Build a textmode.js sketch that renders animated Perlin-noise ASCII clouds.
Help me set up textmode.js with the UMD script tag and get a first sketch on screen.
My textmode.js sketch draws everything in the center instead of the top-left — what's wrong?
Convert an uploaded image to ASCII in the browser using textmode.js and a custom glyph ramp.
Export my textmode.js animation as a looping GIF and an MP4.
Write a custom GLSL material shader for a textmode.js sketch.
Add a second layer with a screen blend mode and a bloom filter to my textmode.js piece.
Make an audio-reactive VJ visual on a character grid with textmode.js.
Why is t.grid.cols undefined before setup runs in my textmode.js sketch?
Use t.createGlyphRamp and t.noise to map brightness to characters.
should_not_trigger: Make some ASCII art of a cat.
Convert this image to ASCII art in Python with Pillow.
Generate an ASCII banner for my README with figlet.
Draw a particle system in p5.js.
Render text to a canvas with the 2D canvas API.
Write a bash one-liner that prints a box-drawing border.
Build a terminal TUI with blessed/ink in Node.
How do I print colored text in my terminal with ANSI escape codes?

evals.prompt: Set up a minimal textmode.js sketch (ESM) that fills the grid background and draws a red 'A' rectangle, resizing with the window.
evals.expected_output: Uses `import { textmode } from "textmode.js"`, `textmode.create({width,height,fontSize,frameRate})`, `t.setup`/`t.draw`, sets `t.char`/`t.charColor` and calls `t.background` then `t.rect` (sized in cells), and wires `t.windowResized` to `t.resizeCanvas`. Does NOT assume a top-left origin.

evals.prompt: Write a textmode.js draw loop that maps Perlin noise to characters using a glyph ramp, animated over time.
evals.expected_output: Creates a ramp with `t.createGlyphRamp(" .:-=+*#%@")` in setup, reads `t.noise(x*scale, y*scale, t.frameCount*scale)` per cell, calls `ramp.at(n)`, and offsets cell indices by `-cols/2, -rows/2` (center origin) when translating. Stamps cells with `t.point()` inside `push`/`pop`.

evals.prompt: My textmode.js sketch shows a black canvas and nothing draws. Debug it.
evals.expected_output: Checks WebGL2 support, that `t.draw` runs and `t.background` is called each frame, that assets were awaited in `setup`, and that drawing isn't off-screen due to the center origin. Inspects the console for renderer-init errors.

evals.prompt: Export 120 frames of my textmode.js sketch as a looping GIF.
evals.expected_output: Calls `await t.saveGIF({ filename, frameCount: 120, frameRate, repeat: 0 })`, and notes that a deterministic seed plus a period that divides frameCount yields a clean loop; optionally `noLoop()` + `redraw(1)` for frame-accurate capture.
